isolate_bookings.name: isolate_bookings
isolate_bookings.using:
(school_id = (NULLIF(current_setting('app.current_school_id'::text, true), ''::text))::uuid)
        OR 
        (instructor_id IN (
          SELECT id FROM instructors 
          WHERE user_id = (NULLIF(current_setting('app.current_user_id'::text, true), ''::text))::uuid
        ))

cars_year_check.name: cars_year_check
cars_year_check.value: year >= 1990 AND year <= extract(year from now())::int + 1

isolate_payments.name: isolate_payments
isolate_payments.using:
(booking_id IN ( SELECT bookings.id
   FROM bookings
  WHERE (bookings.school_id = (NULLIF(current_setting('app.current_school_id'::text, true), ''::text))::uuid)))

school_users_permission_check.name: school_users_permission_check
school_users_permission_check.value: permission IS NULL OR permission = ANY (ARRAY['view'::text, 'edit'::text])

school_users_owner_permission_check.name: school_users_owner_permission_check
school_users_owner_permission_check.value: (role = 'owner' AND permission IS NULL) OR (role <> 'owner' AND permission IS NOT NULL)
